items.title: 无标题文章
items.summary: It's absolutely shocking that German restaurants can hire lawyers to make Google take down any local reviews that aren't 5 stars. I've had a take-down notice for a 3-star review for what was a fairly average burger place. I could try to contest it, but without going to court it would likely amount to nothing. Don't believe Google Maps ratings in Germany.
